content: {"business_logic": "Gestiona la carga y limpieza de datos provenientes de bancos para su posterior conciliaci\u00f3n.", "dependencies": ["@/components/ui/card", "react", "@/components/ui/BaseModal", "react-dropzone", "@/lib/dexie", "@/lib/ipv/engine", "@/lib/ipv/bandecParser", "@/lib/ipv/utils", "@/components/ui/button", "@/components/ui/badge", "lucide-react", "sonner", "papaparse", "xlsx", "uuid", "@/lib/ipv/backup"], "domain": "UI", "exports": ["BankIngestion"], "id": "src/components/views/terminal/views/ipv/BankIngestion.tsx", "name": "BankIngestion.tsx", "technical_description": "M\u00f3dulo de procesamiento de extractos bancarios.", "user_description": "Elemento de la interfaz de usuario para interactuar con BankIngestion.tsx."}
